videos.title: The Production AI Playbook: Deploying Agents at Enterprise Scale — Sandipan Bhaumik, Databricks
videos.summary: This video outlines a practical framework for deploying AI agents in enterprise environments, helping teams move successfully from simple demos to robust production systems. It addresses the common pitfalls of AI deployments and details five key pillars—evaluation, observability, data foundation, orchestration, and governance—critical for building reliable enterprise AI.

timestamps.topic: The common pitfalls of deploying AI
The five pillars of production AI
Multi-agent orchestration patterns

videos.title: The 3 Skills I'd Learn In the Age of AI
videos.summary: This video outlines three career-saving pillars—AI literacy, revenue connection, and personal branding—to survive the AI transition. The core takeaway is that shifting toward revenue-generating and highly visible roles is the ultimate way to stay irreplaceable.

timestamps.topic: Connecting your work to revenue generation
Developing a personal brand to build authority
The crucial role of sales skills in any career

videos.title: Being T20 in Malaysia Doesn’t Actually Mean You’re Rich | In The Studio
videos.summary: This video breaks down the complexities of Malaysia's 'T20' income category, challenging the assumption that all high earners are wealthy. By exploring factors like family size, location, and financial obligations, the guests reveal why blanket policies using T20 as a benchmark can be deeply flawed.

timestamps.topic: Statistical definition of T20
Income versus economic vulnerability
The complexities of tax structures for high earners

videos.title: How cryptocurrency creates risks for everyone | Tonantzin Carmona | TEDxMidAtlantic
videos.summary: This thought-provoking talk draws powerful parallels between the 2008 financial crisis and the rise of cryptocurrency, warning that history is repeating itself. The core takeaway is that crypto's integration into mainstream finance poses systemic risks to everyday citizens, even those who choose not to invest in it.

timestamps.topic: Systemic flaws of the 2008 crisis and how blame shifted to victims
How crypto mimics subprime dynamics through predatory inclusion
The hidden integration of crypto into public pension funds

videos.title: Only Allah Knows What You Went Through | LATEST Khutbah by Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: Navigating the high-pressure tech industry early in your career can easily lead to silent burnout, imposter syndrome, and stress. In this moving khutbah, Dr. Omar Suleiman provides profound spiritual solace to help you rebuild your emotional resilience through faith. It is the perfect anchor to keep your mental health and spiritual purpose aligned amid demanding corporate life.

videos.title: Advice to a 22-year-old
videos.summary: This video offers valuable, practical career advice for young adults navigating their early twenties, focusing on action over passive consumption. The core takeaway is to shift from consuming content to actively producing, experimenting with diverse projects to discover what truly energizes you.

timestamps.topic: Shift from consuming to creating
The reality of 'following your passion'

videos.title: The Real Reason You’ve Lost Your Spiritual Drive | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This video explores why spiritual motivation wanes over time, highlighting setbacks and lack of clear religious goals as key factors. By understanding these obstacles, viewers can realign their priorities and re-energize their commitment to faith.

timestamps.topic: Two reasons for losing motivation
Setting goals for your faith

videos.title: Why Malaysian Tech Startup Companies Failed (and What’s Changing Now)?
videos.summary: This video diagnostic explores why Malaysia's initial tech startup boom in the 2010s faltered due to risk aversion, grant dependency, and limited global vision. It highlights how a resilient new generation of founders is leveraging these lessons to build a mature, collaborative, and regionally competitive tech ecosystem.

timestamps.topic: The pitfalls of copycat business models
How government grant dependency stunts market validation
The transition toward globally-focused regional players

videos.title: How I got my Startup in the Silicon Valley of Malaysia
videos.summary: This engaging vlog follows a startup founder's journey through the prestigious MaGIC Global Accelerator Program in Malaysia, offering a behind-the-scenes look at the entrepreneurial grind. Aspiring business owners will find immense value in her practical advice on goal-setting, networking, and trusting the journey of scaling a business.

timestamps.topic: The Global Accelerator Program Launch and selection process
Key takeaways on goal-setting and using vision boards

videos.title: CI/CD with Robert Erez
videos.summary: This video features an insightful discussion on the practical realities of modern software deployment, cutting through the hype of buzzwords like GitOps and Kubernetes. Industry veteran Rob Erez shares real-world lessons on progressive delivery, explaining why rolling forward is often safer than rolling back and how platform teams can simplify developer workflows. It is a must-watch for anyone looking to understand how engineering teams actually ship reliable software at scale.

timestamps.topic: The four stages of deployment maturity: YOLO, CI, CD, and Continuous Deployment
The pillars of GitOps and why the 'everything in Git' mindset is a trap
Why database schema changes make rollbacks incredibly difficult

videos.title: You automated everyone else away — don't be surprised
videos.summary: Kelsey Hightower discusses the irony of software developers facing automation from AI after decades of automating other industries. He explains that tech disruption is cyclical, which is why companies building AI tools are eager to embrace this future.

timestamps.topic: The irony of software developers automating other industries
Why AI and hardware companies champion automation

videos.title: Why MCP and ChatGPT Apps Use Double Iframes — Frédéric Barthelet, Alpic
videos.summary: This presentation demystifies the complex 'double iframe' security architecture used by platforms like ChatGPT and Claude to safely render third-party applications. By understanding these sandbox mechanisms, developers can build more secure, compliant, and functional AI-powered widgets without compromising user data.

timestamps.topic: How MCP and ChatGPT Apps work under the hood
The security limits of single-iframe approaches
Demonstration of the Skybridge CSP Inspector tool

videos.title: Why Can't Anyone Answer Questions About the Business? — Garrett Galow, WorkOS
videos.summary: This presentation demonstrates how WorkOS built an internal AI assistant, 'Studio,' to eliminate the bottleneck of manually querying databases for business insights. Viewers will learn how LLM agents can safely and dynamically build reusable dashboards for non-technical teams, boosting operational efficiency. It offers a practical blueprint for unlocking self-serve data analytics using modern AI design patterns.

timestamps.topic: The Problem: The Tedious Workflow of Internal Data Queries
Building Reusable Data Widgets with AI
Designing Reliable LLM Database Agents

videos.title: Public Speaking Practice: Excellence vs Perfection
videos.summary: Struggling to balance high-quality work with the paralyzing grip of perfectionism? In this quick exercise, productivity expert Ali Abdaal shares a simple, practical strategy of adjusting your 'quality bar' to keep making progress. It is a must-watch for creators and professionals looking to overcome creative blocks and maintain consistency.

timestamps.topic: The tension between excellence and perfectionism
Overcoming perfectionism by adjusting your quality bar

videos.title: In production, which file actually gets loaded?
videos.summary: Test your web development skills with this quick package management challenge addressing a common headache: bugs that only pop up after deployment. Learn how conditional exports in package.json resolve differently between development and production, helping you avoid unexpected environment mismatches.

timestamps.topic: Introduction to the post-deployment bug challenge
Analyzing the exports configuration and the core question
